grep -n "class AdminFilterChain\|AdminFilterChain\b" /workspace/envoy--v1.31.2/source/server/admin/admin.h | head -10 && grep -n "class AdminFilterChain\|AdminFilterChain\b" /workspace/envoy--v1.31.2/source/server/admin/admin.cc | head -10

grep -n "handlerClusters\|class ClustersHandler" /workspace/envoy--v1.31.2/source/server/admin/clusters_handler.cc | head -5 && grep -n "handlerListenerInfo\|handlerDrainListeners\|class ListenersHandler" /workspace/envoy--v1.31.2/source/server/admin/listeners_handler.cc | head -5 && grep -n "handlerConfigDump\|class ConfigDumpHandler" /workspace/envoy--v1.31.2/source/server/admin/config_dump_handler.cc | head -5

# Check if there's a prometheus_stats.cc that is separate from stats_handler.cc
grep -n "class\|PrometheusStats\|handlerPrometheus" /workspace/envoy--v1.31.2/source/server/admin/prometheus_stats.cc | head -10

    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/server/admin/admin.cc", "symbol": "AdminImpl::makeHandler"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/server/admin/admin.cc", "symbol": "AdminImpl::addHandler"},

    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/server/admin/admin_filter.cc", "symbol": "AdminFilter::onComplete"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/server/admin/clusters_handler.cc", "symbol": "ClustersHandler::handlerClusters"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/server/admin/listeners_handler.cc", "symbol": "ListenersHandler::handlerListenerInfo"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/server/admin/config_dump_handler.cc", "symbol": "ConfigDumpHandler::handlerConfigDump"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/server/admin/stats_handler.cc", "symbol": "StatsHandler::statsHandler"}
  ],
  "text": "The Envoy admin API endpoint registration is implemented in the `envoyproxy/envoy` repository under `source/server/admin/`.\n\n**Core admin registration (`admin.cc` / `admin.h`):** `AdminImpl` (source/server/admin/admin.cc, source/server/admin/admin.h) is the central class. In its constructor, it registers all admin endpoints by calling the internal `makeHandler()` helper, which builds `UrlHandler` entries stored in `handlers_`. The public API `AdminImpl::addHandler()` (line 485 of admin.cc) allows external code to register additional handlers at runtime. Handler registration for key endpoints:\n- `/clusters` → `ClustersHandler::handlerClusters`\n- `/config_dump` → `ConfigDumpHandler::handlerConfigDump`\n- `/listeners` → `ListenersHandler::handlerListenerInfo`\n- `/stats` and `/stats/prometheus` → `StatsHandler::statsHandler` / `StatsHandler::handlerPrometheusStats`\n\n**Admin filter chain setup (`admin.cc`):** `AdminImpl::createNetworkFilterChain()` (line 289) sets up the network-level filter chain for the admin listener connection. `AdminImpl::createFilterChain()` (line 300) sets up the HTTP-level filter chain, injecting an `AdminFilter` instance into the HTTP filter chain via `callbacks.addStreamFilter()`.\n\n**Admin filter (`admin_filter.cc` / `admin_filter.h`):** `AdminFilter` is an HTTP stream decoder filter. `AdminFilter::decodeHeaders()` dispatches the request to the matching registered handler, and `AdminFilter::onComplete()` finalizes the response.\n\n**Endpoint implementations:**\n- `/clusters`: `source/server/admin/clusters_handler.cc` (`ClustersHandler::handlerClusters`)\n- `/listeners`: `source/server/admin/listeners_handler.cc` (`ListenersHandler::handlerListenerInfo`, `ListenersHandler::handlerDrainListeners`)\n- `/config_dump`: `source/server/admin/config_dump_handler.cc` (`ConfigDumpHandler::handlerConfigDump`)\n- `/stats`: `source/server/admin/stats_handler.cc` (`StatsHandler::statsHandler`, `StatsHandler::handlerResetCounters`, `StatsHandler::handlerPrometheusStats`, `StatsHandler::handlerContention`); Prometheus formatting is in `source/server/admin/prometheus_stats.cc`."
}

conversation_events.text:
# Envoy Admin API Endpoint Registration

## Your Task

Find all C++ source files in envoyproxy/envoy that implement the admin API: the admin handler registration (addHandler), the /clusters, /listeners, /config_dump, and /stats endpoint implementations, and the admin filter chain setup.

## Context

You are working on a codebase task involving repos from the platform domain.

## Available Resources

The local `/workspace/` directory contains: sg-evals/envoy--v1.31.2, sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367, sg-evals/go-control-plane--71637ad6, sg-evals/grpc--957dba5e.


## Output Format

Create a file at `/workspace/answer.json` with your findings in the following structure:

```json
{
  "files": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go"}
  ],
  "symbols": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "SymbolName"}
  ],
  "chain": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "FunctionName"}
  ],
  "text": "Narrative explanation of your findings, citing repos and file paths."
}
```

Include only the fields relevant to this task. Your answer is evaluated against a closed-world oracle — completeness matters.

## Evaluation

Your answer will be scored on:
- **File recall and precision**: Did you find all relevant files?
Now I have all the relevant files. Let me create the answer.
Now I have enough information to create the answer.

The answer has been written to `/workspace/answer.json`. Here's a summary of findings:

## Admin API Endpoint Registration in `envoyproxy/envoy`

### Core Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `source/server/admin/admin.cc` | Main admin implementation: `AdminImpl::addHandler()`, `makeHandler()`, `createFilterChain()`, `createNetworkFilterChain()`, and all endpoint registrations in the constructor |
| `source/server/admin/admin.h` | `AdminImpl` class declaration + `AdminFilterChain` inner class |
| `source/server/admin/admin_filter.cc` | `AdminFilter` HTTP stream filter: `decodeHeaders()` dispatches requests, `onComplete()` sends responses |
| `source/server/admin/admin_filter.h` | `AdminFilter` declaration |

### Endpoint Implementations

| Endpoint | File | Symbol |
|----------|------|--------|
| `/clusters` | `clusters_handler.cc` | `ClustersHandler::handlerClusters` |
| `/listeners` | `listeners_handler.cc` | `ListenersHandler::handlerListenerInfo`, `handlerDrainListeners` |
| `/config_dump` | `config_dump_handler.cc` | `ConfigDumpHandler::handlerConfigDump` |
| `/stats` | `stats_handler.cc` | `StatsHandler::statsHandler`, `handlerPrometheusStats`, `handlerResetCounters`, `handlerContention` |
| `/stats/prometheus` | `prometheus_stats.cc` | `PrometheusStatsFormatter` |

### Filter Chain Setup

`AdminImpl::createNetworkFilterChain()` sets up the network-level filter chain, and `AdminImpl::createFilterChain()` injects `AdminFilter` into the HTTP filter chain. The `AdminImpl::AdminFilterChain` inner class (defined in `admin.h`) implements `Network::FilterChain`.

    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/server/admin/admin.cc", "symbol": "AdminImpl::addHandler"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/server/admin/admin.cc", "symbol": "AdminImpl::createNetworkFilterChain"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/server/admin/admin.cc", "symbol": "AdminImpl::createFilterChain"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/server/admin/admin_filter.cc", "symbol": "AdminFilter::decodeHeaders"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/server/admin/admin_filter.cc", "symbol": "AdminFilter::onComplete"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/server/admin/clusters_handler.cc", "symbol": "ClustersHandler::handlerClusters"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/server/admin/listeners_handler.cc", "symbol": "ListenersHandler::handlerListenerInfo"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/server/admin/config_dump_handler.cc", "symbol": "ConfigDumpHandler::handlerConfigDump"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/server/admin/stats_handler.cc", "symbol": "StatsHandler::statsHandler"}
  ],
  "text": "The Envoy admin API endpoint registration is implemented in the `envoyproxy/envoy` repository under `source/server/admin/`.\n\n**Core admin registration (`admin.cc` / `admin.h`):** `AdminImpl` (source/server/admin/admin.cc, source/server/admin/admin.h) is the central class. In its constructor, it registers all admin endpoints by calling the internal `makeHandler()` helper, which builds `UrlHandler` entries stored in `handlers_`. The public API `AdminImpl::addHandler()` (line 485 of admin.cc) allows external code to register additional handlers at runtime. Handler registration for key endpoints:\n- `/clusters` → `ClustersHandler::handlerClusters`\n- `/config_dump` → `ConfigDumpHandler::handlerConfigDump`\n- `/listeners` → `ListenersHandler::handlerListenerInfo`\n- `/stats` and `/stats/prometheus` → `StatsHandler::statsHandler` / `StatsHandler::handlerPrometheusStats`\n\n**Admin filter chain setup (`admin.cc`):** `AdminImpl::createNetworkFilterChain()` (line 289) sets up the network-level filter chain for the admin listener connection. `AdminImpl::createFilterChain()` (line 300) sets up the HTTP-level filter chain, injecting an `AdminFilter` instance into the HTTP filter chain via `callbacks.addStreamFilter()`.\n\n**Admin filter (`admin_filter.cc` / `admin_filter.h`):** `AdminFilter` is an HTTP stream decoder filter. `AdminFilter::decodeHeaders()` dispatches the request to the matching registered handler, and `AdminFilter::onComplete()` finalizes the response.\n\n**Endpoint implementations:**\n- `/clusters`: `source/server/admin/clusters_handler.cc` (`ClustersHandler::handlerClusters`)\n- `/listeners`: `source/server/admin/listeners_handler.cc` (`ListenersHandler::handlerListenerInfo`, `ListenersHandler::handlerDrainListeners`)\n- `/config_dump`: `source/server/admin/config_dump_handler.cc` (`ConfigDumpHandler::handlerConfigDump`)\n- `/stats`: `source/server/admin/stats_handler.cc` (`StatsHandler::statsHandler`, `StatsHandler::handlerResetCounters`, `StatsHandler::handlerPrometheusStats`, `StatsHandler::handlerContention`); Prometheus formatting is in `source/server/admin/prometheus_stats.cc`."
}

The public API `AdminImpl::addHandler()` (line 485 of admin.cc) allows external code to register additional handlers at runtime.   "text": "The Envoy admin API endpoint registration is implemented in the `envoyproxy/envoy` repository under `source/server/admin/`.\n\n**Core admin registration (`admin.cc` / `admin.h`):** `AdminImpl` (source/server/admin/admin.cc, source/server/admin/admin.h) is the central class. In its constructor, it registers all admin endpoints by calling the internal `makeHandler()` helper, which builds `UrlHandler` entries stored in `handlers_`. The public API `AdminImpl::addHandler()` (line 485 of admin.cc) allows external code to register additional handlers at runtime. Handler registration for key endpoints:\n- `/clusters` → `ClustersHandler::handlerClusters`\n- `/config_dump` → `ConfigDumpHandler::handlerConfigDump`\n- `/listeners` → `ListenersHandler::handlerListenerInfo`\n- `/stats` and `/stats/prometheus` → `StatsHandler::statsHandler` / `StatsHandler::handlerPrometheusStats`\n\n**Admin filter chain setup (`admin.cc`):** `AdminImpl::createNetworkFilterChain()` (line 289) sets up the network-level filter chain for the admin listener connection. `AdminImpl::createFilterChain()` (line 300) sets up the HTTP-level filter chain, injecting an `AdminFilter` instance into the HTTP filter chain via `callbacks.addStreamFilter()`.\n\n**Admin filter (`admin_filter.cc` / `admin_filter.h`):** `AdminFilter` is an HTTP stream decoder filter. `AdminFilter::decodeHeaders()` dispatches the request to the matching registered handler, and `AdminFilter::onComplete()` finalizes the response.\n\n**Endpoint implementations:**\n- `/clusters`: `source/server/admin/clusters_handler.cc` (`ClustersHandler::handlerClusters`)\n- `/listeners`: `source/server/admin/listeners_handler.cc` (`ListenersHandler::handlerListenerInfo`, `ListenersHandler::handlerDrainListeners`)\n- `/config_dump`: `source/server/admin/config_dump_handler.cc` (`ConfigDumpHandler::handlerConfigDump`)\n- `/stats`: `source/server/admin/stats_handler.cc` (`StatsHandler::statsHandler`, `StatsHandler::handlerResetCounters`, `StatsHandler::handlerPrometheusStats`, `StatsHandler::handlerContention`); Prometheus formatting is in `source/server/admin/prometheus_stats.cc`."
}
